1311.iwh_en: It was narrated that the Prophet ﷺ said to Umar ibn Abi Salamah: 'Say the name of Allah and eat from what is in front of you.'
1311.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ berkata kepada Umar ibn Abi Salamah: 'Sebutlah nama Allah dan makanlah dari apa yang ada di hadapanmu.'

1312.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ was eating food with six of his Companions when a Bedouin came and ate it in two mouthfuls. The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Had he mentioned the name of Allah it would have sufficed you. When one of you eats, let him mention the name of Allah. If he forgets to mention the name of Allah at the beginning, let him say: In the name of Allah at its beginning and its end.'
1312.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ sedang makan bersama enam orang dari sahabatnya ketika seorang Badui datang dan memakannya dalam dua suapan. Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Seandainya ia menyebut nama Allah niscaya itu mencukupi kalian. Apabila salah seorang dari kalian makan, hendaklah ia menyebut nama Allah. Jika ia lupa menyebut nama Allah di awal, hendaklah ia mengucapkan: Bismillah di awalnya dan di akhirnya.'

1313.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Busr (may Allah be pleased with him) that his father said to his mother: 'If only you would prepare food for the Messenger of Allah ﷺ.' So she prepared tharidah and his father went and invited him. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ placed his hand on the top of it, then said: 'Take in the name of Allah.' They took from around the edges and ate until they were satisfied.
1313.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Busr (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ayahnya berkata kepada ibunya: 'Seandainya kamu membuat makanan untuk Rasulullah ﷺ.' Maka ibunya membuat tharidah dan ayahnya pergi mengundang beliau. Rasulullah ﷺ meletakkan tangannya di atas puncaknya, kemudian bersabda: 'Ambillah dengan menyebut nama Allah.' Mereka mengambil dari sekelilingnya dan makan hingga kenyang.

1314.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Umamah (may Allah be pleased with him) that when the Messenger of Allah ﷺ ate or drank, he would say: 'Praise be to Allah, abundant, pure and blessed praise, continuously, without end, without cessation, and not in any way that suggests we are independent of our Lord.'
1314.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Umamah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ apabila makan atau minum, beliau mengucapkan: 'Segala puji bagi Allah, pujian yang banyak, baik, dan penuh berkah, terus menerus, tanpa akhir, tanpa henti, dan tidak dalam keadaan merasa tidak butuh kepada Rabb kami.'

1315.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sinan ibn Sinnah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'One who eats and gives thanks is like a fasting person who is patient.'
1315.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sinan ibn Sinnah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Orang yang makan dan bersyukur adalah seperti orang yang berpuasa dan bersabar.'

1316.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'When one of you eats, let him lick his three fingers.'
1316.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila salah seorang dari kalian selesai makan, hendaklah ia menjilat ketiga jarinya.'

1317.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Do not wipe your hand until you have licked it, for you do not know in which part of the food the blessing is.'
1317.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Janganlah engkau menyeka tanganmu hingga engkau menjilatinya, karena engkau tidak tahu di bagian mana dari makanan itu terdapat berkah.'

1318.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ commanded licking the fingers and the plate and said: 'You do not know in which of them the blessing is.'
1318.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkan menjilati jari-jari dan piring, dan bersabda: 'Engkau tidak tahu di bagian mana dari keduanya terdapat berkah.'

1319.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Blessing descends in the middle of the food, so eat from around the edges and do not eat from the middle.'
1319.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Berkah turun di tengah makanan, maka makanlah dari sekelilingnya dan jangan makan dari tengahnya.'

1320.iwh_en: It was narrated from Amr ibn Abi Salamah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he was a young boy in the lap of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and his hand was reaching all over the dish. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'O young boy, say the name of Allah, eat with your right hand, and eat from what is in front of you.'
1320.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Amr ibn Abi Salamah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia adalah seorang anak kecil di bawah asuhan Rasulullah ﷺ dan tangannya berkeliling di piring. Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Hai anak, sebutlah nama Allah, makanlah dengan tangan kananmu, dan makanlah dari apa yang ada di hadapanmu.'

1321.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When one of you eats, let him eat with his right hand and drink with his right hand, for Satan eats with his left and drinks with his left.'
1321.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila salah seorang dari kalian makan, hendaklah ia makan dengan tangan kanannya dan minum dengan tangan kanannya, karena setan makan dengan tangan kirinya dan minum dengan tangan kirinya.'

1322.iwh_en: It was narrated that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ saw Busr ibn Rafi al-Ayr eating with his left hand and said: 'Eat with your right hand.' He said: I cannot. He said: 'May you never be able.' And his right hand never reached his mouth again.
1322.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melihat Busr ibn Rafi al-Ayr makan dengan tangan kirinya dan bersabda: 'Makanlah dengan tangan kananmu.' Ia berkata: Aku tidak mampu. Beliau bersabda: 'Semoga kamu tidak pernah mampu.' Dan tangan kanannya tidak pernah lagi mencapai mulutnya.

1323.iwh_en: It was narrated from Kab ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ used to eat with three fingers and would not wipe his hand until he had licked it.
1323.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ka'b ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa makan dengan tiga jari dan tidak menyeka tangannya hingga menjilatinya.

1324.iwh_en: It was narrated from Kab ibn Malik or Abdullah ibn Kab (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ used to eat with his three fingers and when he finished he licked them. Hisham pointed with his three fingers.
1324.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ka'b ibn Malik atau Abdullah ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa makan dengan tiga jarinya dan ketika selesai beliau menjilatinya. Hisyam menunjuk dengan tiga jarinya.

1325.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Indeed Allah is pleased with a servant who eats a meal and praises Him for it, or drinks a drink and praises Him for it.'
1325.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya Allah ridha kepada seorang hamba yang makan makanan kemudian memuji-Nya karenanya, atau minum minuman kemudian memuji-Nya karenanya.'

1326.iwh_en: It was narrated from Muadh ibn Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever eats food and says: Praise be to Allah who fed me this and provided it for me without any power or might on my part — he will be forgiven his past sins.'
1326.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Muadh ibn Anas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang makan makanan kemudian mengucapkan: Segala puji bagi Allah yang telah memberi makan ini kepadaku dan menyediakan untukku tanpa daya dan kekuatan dariku — maka akan diampuni dosa-dosanya yang telah lalu.'

1327.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Said al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to say when he finished eating: 'Praise be to Allah who fed us, gave us drink, and made us Muslims.'
1327.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Said al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mengucapkan ketika selesai makan: 'Segala puji bagi Allah yang telah memberi kami makan, memberi kami minum, dan menjadikan kami orang-orang Islam.'

1328.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ never criticized food. If he desired it he ate it, and if he disliked it he left it.
1328.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ tidak pernah mencela makanan. Jika beliau menyukainya maka beliau memakannya, dan jika beliau tidak menyukainya maka beliau meninggalkannya.

1329.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ never criticized any food. If he was hungry he ate it, and if he was full he left it.
1329.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Rasulullah ﷺ tidak pernah mencela makanan apapun. Jika beliau lapar maka beliau memakannya, dan jika beliau kenyang maka beliau meninggalkannya.

1330.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ prohibited eating with the left hand. He also prohibited blowing into a vessel and said that the vessel should be covered with a stick.
1330.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ melarang makan dengan tangan kiri. Beliau juga melarang meniup ke dalam bejana dan bersabda bahwa bejana harus ditutup dengan sebatang kayu.

1331.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'The believer eats with one intestine and the disbeliever eats with seven intestines.'
1331.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Orang mukmin makan dengan satu usus dan orang kafir makan dengan tujuh usus.'

1332.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'The food of one suffices two, the food of two suffices four, and the food of four suffices eight.'
1332.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Makanan untuk satu orang mencukupi dua orang, makanan untuk dua orang mencukupi empat orang, dan makanan untuk empat orang mencukupi delapan orang.'

1333.iwh_en: It was narrated that the Prophet ﷺ said to Umar ibn Abi Salamah: 'Say the name of Allah and eat from what is in front of you.'
1333.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ berkata kepada Umar ibn Abi Salamah: 'Sebutlah nama Allah dan makanlah dari apa yang ada di hadapanmu.'

1334.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was brought a bowl of tharid and said: 'Eat from its edges — or sides — and do not eat from its middle, for blessing descends in its middle.'
1334.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ didatangkan sebuah mangkuk berisi tharid dan bersabda: 'Makanlah dari sisinya — atau pinggirnya — dan jangan makan dari tengahnya, karena berkah turun di tengahnya.'

1335.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Abi Bakr (may Allah be pleased with her) that when tharid was brought to her, she would order it to be covered until the steam from its smoke had dissipated, saying: I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'That is greater in blessing.'
1335.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma' bint Abi Bakr (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika tharid dibawa kepadanya, ia memerintahkan agar ditutup hingga uap asapnya hilang, seraya berkata: Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Itu lebih besar berkahnya.'

1336.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ took him by the hand one day to his house and said: 'Is there any lunch or dinner?' — Talha was uncertain which word was used. He said: Some pieces of bread were brought out and he said: 'Is there any condiment?' They said: Nothing but some vinegar. He said: 'Bring it. What an excellent condiment vinegar is.'
1336.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ pada suatu hari mengambil tangannya menuju rumahnya dan bersabda: 'Adakah makan siang atau makan malam?' — Talhah ragu kata mana yang digunakan. Ia berkata: Beberapa potong roti dikeluarkan dan beliau berkata: 'Adakah lauk?' Mereka berkata: Tidak ada kecuali sedikit cuka. Beliau bersabda: 'Bawalah. Alangkah baiknya lauk itu cuka.'

1337.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'What an excellent condiment or food vinegar is.'
1337.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Alangkah baiknya lauk atau makanan itu cuka.'

1338.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: I saw the Prophet ﷺ brought a broth containing gourd and dried meat, and I saw him seeking out the gourd and eating it.
1338.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Aku melihat Nabi ﷺ didatangkan kaldu yang berisi labu dan daging kering, dan aku melihat beliau mencari-cari labu dan memakannya.

1339.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ liked gourd. He said: It was presented to him and I would take it and place it before him.
1339.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ menyukai labu. Ia berkata: Labu itu dihidangkan kepadanya dan aku mengambilnya dan meletakkannya di hadapan beliau.

1340.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Asid al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Eat olive oil and use it as a condiment and anoint yourself with it, for it comes from a blessed tree.'
1340.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Asid al-Ansari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Makanlah minyak zaitun dan jadikanlah ia lauk-pauk dan olehlah diri kalian dengannya, karena ia berasal dari pohon yang diberkahi.'

1341.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said during the campaign of Khaybar: 'Whoever ate from this tree' — meaning garlic — 'let him not come to the mosques.'
1341.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda dalam perang Khaybar: 'Barangsiapa yang memakan dari pohon ini' — yaitu bawang putih — 'maka janganlah ia mendatangi masjid-masjid.'

1342.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Ayyub (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ stayed with us and we prepared food for him that contained some of these greens. When we brought it to him he disliked it and said to his Companions: 'Eat it, for I am not like any of you — I fear I would offend my companion.' Abu Muhammad said: His companion means the angel.
1342.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Ayyub (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: Rasulullah ﷺ singgah di rumah kami dan kami menyiapkan makanan untuknya yang mengandung beberapa sayuran ini. Ketika kami membawanya kepadanya beliau tidak menyukainya dan berkata kepada para sahabatnya: 'Makanlah, karena aku tidak seperti salah seorang dari kalian — aku khawatir akan menyakiti sahabatku.' Abu Muhammad berkata: Sahabatnya yang dimaksud adalah malaikat.

1343.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zahdam al-Jarmi (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: We were with Abu Musa and food was brought to him — it included chicken meat. Among the people was a red-faced man from Banu Taym Allah who did not approach the food. Abu Musa said to him: 'Come, for I have seen the Messenger of Allah ﷺ eat from it.'
1343.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zahdam al-Jarmi (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Kami bersama Abu Musa dan makanan dibawa kepadanya — di dalamnya ada daging ayam. Di antara orang-orang ada seorang laki-laki berkulit merah dari Bani Taim Allah yang tidak mendekat. Abu Musa berkata kepadanya: 'Kemarilah, karena aku telah melihat Rasulullah ﷺ memakannya.'

1344.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Musa (may Allah be pleased with him) that he mentioned chicken and said: 'I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ eating it.'
1344.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Musa (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia menyebut ayam dan berkata: 'Aku melihat Rasulullah ﷺ memakannya.'

1345.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Said al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Prophet of Allah ﷺ say: 'Do not keep company except with a believer, and let no one eat your food except a pious person.'
1345.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Said al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Nabi Allah ﷺ bersabda: 'Janganlah berteman kecuali dengan orang yang beriman, dan janganlah ada yang memakan makananmu kecuali orang yang bertakwa.'

1346.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Jafar (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ eating cucumber with fresh dates.
1346.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Jafar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Aku melihat Rasulullah ﷺ memakan mentimun bersama ruthab (kurma segar).

1347.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that while they were in Madinah a year of hardship struck them. Ibn al-Zubayr used to give them dates as provisions. Ibn Umar would pass by them and say: 'Do not take two at a time, for the Messenger of Allah ﷺ prohibited taking two at a time — unless a man asks his brother's permission.'
1347.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa sementara mereka berada di Madinah, sebuah tahun kesulitan melanda mereka. Ibn al-Zubayr biasa memberikan mereka kurma sebagai bekal. Ibn Umar akan melewati mereka dan berkata: 'Jangan mengambil dua sekaligus, karena Rasulullah ﷺ melarang mengambil dua sekaligus — kecuali seseorang meminta izin kepada saudaranya.'

1348.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), wife of the Prophet ﷺ, that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'O Aisha, a house that has no dates — its inhabitants are hungry' or 'its inhabitants will go hungry.' He said this two or three times.
1348.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha), istri Nabi ﷺ, bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Wahai Aisha, sebuah rumah yang tidak memiliki kurma — penghuninya lapar' atau 'penghuninya akan lapar.' Beliau mengatakan ini dua atau tiga kali.

1349.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'The people of a household that have dates among them will not go hungry.'
1349.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Penghuni suatu rumah yang memiliki kurma tidak akan kelaparan.'

1350.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that dates were gifted to the Prophet ﷺ and he began distributing them.
1350.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa kurma dihadiahkan kepada Nabi ﷺ dan beliau mulai membagi-bagikannya.

1351.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ eating dates while sitting on his haunches from hunger. Abu Muhammad said: Yuhaddihi means he was distributing them here and there.
1351.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Aku melihat Rasulullah ﷺ memakan kurma sambil duduk dengan posisi memeluk lutut karena lapar. Abu Muhammad berkata: Yuhaddihi artinya beliau mendistribusikannya ke sini dan ke sana.

1352.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever sleeps with the smell of ghaman (fat/grease) on his hand and something afflicts him, let him blame no one but himself.'
1352.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang tidur sementara ada bau lemak di tangannya dan sesuatu menimpanya, maka janganlah ia menyalahkan siapapun kecuali dirinya sendiri.'

1353.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said to Abd al-Rahman ibn Awf when he saw traces of yellow on him: 'What is this?' He said: I have married. He said: 'Give a wedding feast even if only with a sheep.'
1353.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ berkata kepada Abd al-Rahman ibn Awf ketika beliau melihat bekas kuning padanya: 'Apa ini?' Ia berkata: Aku telah menikah. Beliau bersabda: 'Selenggarakanlah walimah meskipun hanya dengan seekor kambing.'

1354.iwh_en: It was narrated that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'The wedding feast on the first day is an obligation, on the second day it is a goodness, and on the third day it is for show and reputation.'
1354.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Walimah pada hari pertama adalah wajib, pada hari kedua adalah kebaikan, dan pada hari ketiga adalah untuk pamer dan mencari nama.'

1355.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The worst of food is the wedding food — the rich are invited to it and the poor are left out. And whoever abandons the invitation has disobeyed Allah and His Messenger.'
1355.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Makanan yang paling buruk adalah makanan walimah — yang kaya diundang dan yang miskin ditinggalkan. Dan barangsiapa yang meninggalkan undangan maka ia telah mendurhakai Allah dan Rasul-Nya.'

1356.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man came who had prepared food to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and said: O Messenger of Allah, like this — and gestured with his hand. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to him: Like this — and pointed toward Aisha. He said: No. So the Messenger of Allah ﷺ turned away from him, then he gestured a second time saying: Including her as well.
1356.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki yang telah menyiapkan makanan datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan berkata: Wahai Rasulullah, seperti ini — dan menunjuk dengan tangannya. Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepadanya: Seperti ini — dan menunjuk ke arah Aisha. Ia berkata: Tidak. Maka Rasulullah ﷺ berpaling darinya, lalu ia memberi isyarat untuk kedua kalinya mengatakan: Termasuk dia juga.

1357.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Masud (may Allah be pleased with him) that there was a man called Abu Shuayb who had a slave who was a butcher. He said: Prepare food for me so I can invite the Messenger of Allah ﷺ as a fifth of five. He invited the Messenger of Allah ﷺ as a fifth of five and an extra man followed them. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'You invited me as the fifth of five but this man has followed us. If you wish, grant permission to him; if you wish, turn him away.'
1357.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Mas'ud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ada seorang laki-laki yang disebut Abu Syu'ayb yang memiliki seorang budak yang bekerja sebagai jagal. Ia berkata: Siapkan makanan untukku agar aku dapat mengundang Rasulullah ﷺ sebagai yang kelima dari lima orang. Ia mengundang Rasulullah ﷺ sebagai yang kelima dari lima orang dan seorang laki-laki tambahan mengikuti mereka. Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Kamu mengundangku sebagai yang kelima dari lima tetapi orang ini telah mengikuti kami. Jika kamu mau, izinkanlah dia; jika kamu mau, tolaklah dia.'

1358.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The virtue of Aisha over women is like the virtue of tharid over all other food.'
1358.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Keutamaan Aisha atas wanita-wanita lain adalah seperti keutamaan tharid atas semua makanan lainnya.'

1359.iwh_en: It was narrated from Safwan ibn Umayyah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Bite the meat — for that is more delicious and more wholesome.'
1359.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Safwan ibn Umayyah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Gigitlah daging — karena itu lebih lezat dan lebih menyehatkan.'

1360.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Juhayfa (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I do not eat while reclining.'
1360.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Juhayfa (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku tidak makan sambil bersandar.'

1361.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that when the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was brought the first fruit of the season, he would say: 'O Allah, bless us in our city, in our fruit, in our mudd and in our sa — blessing upon blessing.' Then he would give it to the youngest child present.
1361.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ketika Rasulullah ﷺ didatangkan buah-buahan pertama pada musimnya, beliau berdoa: 'Ya Allah, berkahilah kami dalam kota kami, dalam buah-buahan kami, dalam mudd kami dan dalam sha' kami — berkah demi berkah.' Kemudian beliau memberikannya kepada anak yang paling muda di antara yang hadir.

1362.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When the servant of one of you brings him his food, let him seat him with him; if he refuses, let him serve him a morsel or two.'
1362.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila pelayan salah seorang dari kalian membawakan makanannya, hendaklah ia mendudukkannya bersamanya; jika ia menolak, hendaklah ia menyuapkannya satu atau dua suap.'

1363.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'When the servant of one of you brings him food, let him seat him with him, or let him give him a morsel or two or a bite or two, for he has endured its heat and its smoke.'
1363.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila pelayan salah seorang dari kalian membawa makanan, hendaklah ia mendudukkannya bersamanya, atau hendaklah ia memberikan kepadanya satu atau dua suap atau satu atau dua gigitan, karena ia telah menanggung panasnya dan asapnya.'

1364.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ liked sweets and honey.
1364.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: Rasulullah ﷺ menyukai makanan manis dan madu.

1365.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ came out from the privy and was presented with food. It was said to him: Will you not perform ablution? He said: 'Am I going to pray that I need to perform ablution?'
1365.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ keluar dari tempat buang air dan makanan dihidangkan kepadanya. Dikatakan kepadanya: Tidakkah engkau berwudhu? Beliau bersabda: 'Apakah aku akan shalat sehingga aku perlu berwudhu?'

1366.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was in a state of major impurity and wanted to eat or sleep, he would perform ablution.
1366.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: Ketika Rasulullah ﷺ dalam keadaan junub dan ingin makan atau tidur, beliau berwudhu.

1367.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: My close friend ﷺ advised me and said: 'When you cook broth, add more water, then look for a family among your neighbors and take some of it for them.'
1367.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Teman dekatku ﷺ menasihati aku dan bersabda: 'Apabila kamu memasak kaldu, perbanyaklah airnya, kemudian lihatlah keluarga di antara tetanggamu dan ambillah sebagian untuknya.'

1368.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When food is placed, take off your shoes, for that gives more rest to your feet.'
1368.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila makanan dihidangkan, lepaskanlah sandal-sandal kalian, karena itu lebih memberi kenyamanan bagi kaki kalian.'

1369.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Amr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Worship the Most Merciful, spread peace, and feed food — you will enter the gardens.'
1369.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Amr (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sembahlah Ar-Rahman, sebarkanlah salam, dan berilah makan — kalian akan masuk surga.'

1370.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Respond to the invitation when you are invited.' And Abdullah would respond to the invitation whether it was a wedding or other occasion, and he would come even while fasting.
1370.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Penuhi undangan apabila kalian diundang.' Dan Abdullah biasa memenuhi undangan baik itu walimah pernikahan maupun acara lainnya, dan ia datang bahkan saat sedang berpuasa.

1371.iwh_en: It was narrated from Maymunah (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was asked about a mouse that fell into ghee. He said: 'Remove it and what is around it and eat.' Another narration adds: if the ghee is solid, discard the mouse and what is around it; if it is liquid, do not approach it.
1371.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Maimunah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ ditanya tentang tikus yang jatuh ke dalam samin. Beliau bersabda: 'Buanglah ia dan apa yang ada di sekitarnya dan makanlah.' Riwayat lain menambahkan: jika saminnya padat, buang tikus dan apa yang ada di sekitarnya; jika cair, jangan mendekatinya.

1372.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ was asked about a mouse that fell into ghee and died. He said: 'Take it and what is around it and throw it away.'
1372.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ ditanya tentang seekor tikus yang jatuh ke dalam samin dan mati. Beliau bersabda: 'Ambillah ia dan apa yang ada di sekitarnya dan buanglah.'

1373.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever eats, let him use a toothpick. Whatever he picks out, let him spit it out. And whatever he moves with his tongue, let him swallow it.'
1373.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang makan, hendaklah ia menggunakan tusuk gigi. Apa yang ia keluarkan, hendaklah ia memuntahkannya. Dan apa yang ia gerakkan dengan lidahnya, hendaklah ia menelannya.'
